input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.4.1
            TITLE: frame members of the side impact structure must be constructed of closed section tubing

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.4.1: Frame Members of the Side Impact Structure must be constructed of closed section tubing
F.6.4.1 Frame Members of the Side Impact Structure must be constructed of closed section tubing 
meeting F.3.2.1.e or F.3.2.1.f, as applicable

final_answer: rule F.6.4.1: Frame Members of the Side Impact Structure must be constructed of closed section tubing F.6.4.1 Frame Members of the Side Impact Structure must be constructed of closed section tubing meeting F.3.2.1.e or F.3.2.1.f, as applicable
